reviews.comment:
No tenían nafta súper..sólo infinia. Y esto es algo recurrente. Creo q como clientes,  nos merecemos poder elegir y no, ante la necesidad de cargar combustible en ruta, vernos obligados a cargar infinia

(Translated by Google)
They didn't have premium gasoline... only Infinia. And this is a recurring problem. I think that as customers, we deserve to be able to choose and not be forced to buy Infinia when we need to refuel on the road.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvaHRXUWJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un oasis en el medio del desiero.
Servicios sorprendentemente buenos. Puede mejorar. Personal capacitado y amable.

(Translated by Google)
An oasis in the middle of the desert.
Surprisingly good service. Room for improvement. Knowledgeable and friendly staff.

reviews.comment:
Mmmm bastante alejado de lo que se ve en las fotos... chiquito... recomiendo poner aunque sea un foquito más para darle un poco más de vida

(Translated by Google)
Mmm, quite different from what you see in the photos... small... I recommend adding at least one more light to give it a bit more life.

reviews.comment:
Solo trabajan con efectivo y tarjeta ó débito VISA, los cuales son pocos los adherentes, además de la excelente antipatía del playero que carga el combustible. Asegura y llena el viernes tanque en Mendoza, San Juan ó San Luis.

(Translated by Google)
They only accept cash and VISA debit cards, which are few and far between, and the attendant is notoriously unfriendly. Make sure you fill up your tank on Friday in Mendoza, San Juan, or San Luis.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJeDlqQXJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Está ubicada en un punto estratégico, pequeña pero atendida por gente amable. Su servicompras tiene lo justo y necesario. Buen punto del camino para hacer una pausa, tomar algo fresco, recargar combustible y continuar. Eso sí, en verano, hay que estar acostumbrado a lugares cálidos, porque es muy caluroso.

(Translated by Google)
It's located in a strategic spot, small but staffed by friendly people. Its convenience store has just what you need. A good place along the way to stop, grab a drink, refuel, and continue on your way. Just be aware that in summer, you need to be used to warm weather, because it gets very hot.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJb2ZUVUJREAE
